programme.title: Lux Lifestyles
programme.desc: Visit the most elite attractions and experience the culture of Santorini, Greece.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Nikki Gregg heads to Canada's Ottawa Valley to watch over 200 athletes from around the world compete in the World Freestyle Kayaking Championships, and to put her stand up paddling skills to the ultimate test in the huge rapids of the Ottawa River.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Delhi, India.

programme.title: Find Me a Vacation Home
programme.desc: Property hunters look for luxurious vacation homes where paradise is in the backyard.

programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: Poker professional, Chuck, flies around the country playing in high-stakes private poker games; he is trying to persuade his wife, Penny, that with a new plane, he'll always have a seat at the table.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: The best of St. Petersburg and London.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan Legg recounts his best moments from the second season, revealing insights and unseen footage.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Bubba is a corporate lawyer from Georgia planning to move to Charleston, SC with his wife, Grace, to start his own practice; he wants a home with charm and quaintness while Grace is thinking bigger and looking forward to starting a family.

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: High up in the hills of Hollywood, the three homes have views to die for.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Sailors Cheryl and Paul Shard explore the smooth waters of the Bahamas and stop in Green Turtle Cay.

programme.title: Boys Toys
programme.desc: Host Amber Wyatt trials four toys that you've never seen before. She takes to the air in a gyrocopter, travels to Miami to the debut of two brand new luxury yachts and visits a shop that creates beautiful, one-off motorcycles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Tiger Shark as a Camera Operator + Florida Cave Diving
programme.desc: Working with experienced shark handlers, Jonathan puts a camera on the dorsal fin of a tiger shark to see what it can film all by itself; next, he joins an experienced cave diver to explore a famous underwater cave in northern Florida.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Private river islands and wildlife in Zambia.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: Christina teams up with a luxury account on Instagram showcasing extravagant estates in southern California.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: The Kennedy Space Center; NASA engineers discuss the past, present and future of America's space travel.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: A look at what are considered to be some of the best cruises in the world.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Bubba is a corporate lawyer from Georgia planning to move to Charleston, SC with his wife, Grace, to start his own practice; he wants a home with charm and quaintness while Grace is thinking bigger and looking forward to starting a family.

programme.title: Find Me a Luxury Home
programme.desc: Super-rich house hunters tour three ritzy mansions, with everything from bowling alleys to rooftop pools.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Named for great Russian writer Alexander Pushkin, travel Europe's longest river, the Volga, from Moscow to St. Petersburg.

programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: Rob and Tasha have been married for nine years with two young daughters; Rob hit it big in app development and is also an aviation enthusiast; they are in the market for their first jet so they can live the good life.

programme.desc: Glass blowing in Venice; a helicopter tour in London.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan begins the journey from California crossing the Mojave Desert, full of ghost towns and danger. Arriving in Sin City, Las Vegas, he looks around to expose the hidden side of town.

programme.desc: A visit to the Himalayas to seek spiritual enlightenment at the Ganges River; finding peace through movement in the birthplace of yoga.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Scuba diving in Grenada; elephant camps in Chiang Mai.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.desc: Jonathan explores caves beneath the jungle in the Yucatan, investigates venomous fish around the world and swims with the Greenland shark in the St. Lawrence.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Christina explores the geologically fascinating island of Palau.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.sub-title: La Jolla, Beverly Hills, Palm Springs
programme.desc: A billionaire's home in San Diego's beachside La Jolla; a Georgian mansion in Beverly Hills; a unique mansion located in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Key West's treasure hunting history; Fort Jefferson, an isolated fort in the Gulf of Mexico; Ernest Hemingway's Key West home.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: The MS Vivaldi sails the waters of the Danube from Germany to Hungary; Ports of Call: Passau, Melk, Durnstein, Vienna, Esztergom and Budapest.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Rick realizes that Olivia is more than just girlfriend material as he decides between homes.

programme.title: Find Me a Luxury Home
programme.desc: Trauma counselors Ron and Shirley are looking to trade up to a bigger house that feels right for both themselves and their clients.

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: Checking out three homes throughout Los Angeles and seeing what the hills have to offer.

programme.desc: Christina explores the geologically fascinating island of Palau.

programme.title: Facing Waves
